form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at Roma November 18 over 1640m, 12 len behind Skyforger carrying 62kg at $10. When resuming last campaign eighth of 10 at Eagle Farm Bm70 July 19 over 1000m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Mr Galazi carrying 61.5kg at $31. The betting will be key.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped with Galeka on jumping.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at Gold Coast Hcp on March 7 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Memoria carrying 53.5kg at $8. Before that raced on the pace before fading second last of 12 at Eagle Farm Bm85 on February 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Press Link carrying 55kg at $101. Can show more at this level.
